Motion For Order Staying Operation Of Administrative Order
Off Calendar Jul-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THOMAS ELLERBY Motion For Order Staying Operation Of Administrative Order (CCP SECTION 1094.5, subd. (g)):
APPEAR: Robert J. Evans, Esq. 510/238-4190 for petitioner & moving party; Joseph M. Devine, Esq. 474-1900 for respondent & opposing party San Francisco Housing Authority.
RULING: Court grants stay to 09/10/03 and sets hearing date of 09/10/03 for the writ. Respondent to submit record/transcript(s) by 08/01/03; petitioner's points & authorities due 08/22/03; respondent's opposition due 08/29/03; petitioner's reply due 09/05/03. Respondent to pay for preparation of record, however recoverable cost. Petitioner to prepare order. (302/REQ/PB) Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
